creator: hsw@acm.org
text:
Install of xemacs*packages as dependancy from an xemacs21
	master port;  fetch fails to find many dist files.

	The xemacs.org ftp server has many newer files than the
	various port Makefiles.  I downloaded package-index.LATEST.pgp
	dated 2000-11-01 for the package revisions.

Fix: Here is a quick patch that I tried.

MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp


MAINTAINER=	kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp--sG3qEvyjuBkVAj99Gfyo2QJVuEMm2YYYWShxd4H6qrOnBIim
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- xemacs-basic-mule-packages/Makefile	Tue Oct 24 20:09:09 2000
+++ xemacs-basic-mule-packages/Makefile.new	Fri Nov 17 15:29:43 2000
@@ -11,10 +11,10 @@
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_XEMACS}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	packages
 DISTFILES=	\
-		egg-its-1.22-pkg.tar.gz \
-		elib-1.06-pkg.tar.gz \
+		egg-its-1.23-pkg.tar.gz \
+		elib-1.07-pkg.tar.gz \
 		locale-1.16-pkg.tar.gz \
-		mule-base-1.34-pkg.tar.gz \
+		mule-base-1.35-pkg.tar.gz \
 		skk-1.16-pkg.tar.gz
 DIST_SUBDIR=	xemacs
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/japanese/xemacs21-sumo-canna; make install
